summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Safe-Spend 13-step rules engine. Backend rules engine working perfectly with all 13 validation steps. Frontend transactions page and detail page displaying rule evaluations correctly with pass/fail indicators.

ui_bugs.issue: Refresh button selector timeout during automated testing

passed_tests: Rules engine auto-approves spend when all 13 rules pass and under auto-approve threshold
Rules engine denies spend when vendor not in allowlist (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Anthropic)
Rules engine denies spend when category is blocked (transfers category blocked correctly)
Rules engine denies spend when per-transaction limit exceeded ($100 limit enforced)
Rules engine properly tracks and enforces daily cap ($250 limit working)
Idempotent requests return same result with same idempotency key
All 13 rule evaluations recorded in rules_evaluated array
Frontend transactions page loads and displays 29 transactions correctly
Frontend transaction detail page shows complete rule evaluation timeline
Transaction detail page displays pass/fail icons for each rule (CheckCircle/XCircle)
Denial reasons clearly displayed with policy information
Transaction info cards show amount, vendor, category, currency correctly
Balance impact section shows escrow account, balance before/after
Rules evaluation section shows all steps with proper numbering (1-13)
Navigation between transactions list and detail pages works correctly
